verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm not on an ego trip I'm nothing on my own I make mistakes and often slip Just common flesh and bone But I'll prove someday just why I say I'm of a special kind For when He was on the cross I was on His mind.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He knew me, yet He loved me He whose glory makes the heavens shine I was so unworthy of such mercy But when He was on the cross I was on his mind.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The look of love was on His face The thorns were upon His head The blood ran down that scarlet robe It's stained with crimson red As His eyes were upon that crowd that day Jesus looked ahead in time While He was on the cross You and I were on His mind.
